intent_head: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected /99_system, used canonical cast records for birthday authority.
function.outcome_justification: Using current date from context (2026-03-23) and authoritative cast birthday data, the nearest upcoming birthday date is 03-26; only Lukas Brenner matches that next date.
